evals.prompt: Write me a cold email to the owner of Bright Smile Dental. They just opened a second location last month. We offer AI voice agents that handle inbound calls 24/7.
evals.expected_output: Use second-location signal, lowercase 3-5 word subject, open with signal, value prop in their language, single low-friction CTA.
expectations: The response uses the second location opening as a Tier 1 signal
The response uses a lowercase 3-5 word subject line that looks internal
The response opens with the signal not a generic opener
The response uses a single low-friction CTA (15 min call, not 30-min demo)

evals.prompt: Help me write an email to dental offices. I want to send it to 500 of them.
evals.expected_output: Warn 1-3% conversion on identical emails, recommend signal-based segmentation, require trigger event before outreach.
expectations: The response warns that identical email to 500 prospects converts at 1-3%
The response recommends signal-based approach instead of mass blast
The response requires a trigger event before outreach
The response recommends segmenting and personalizing opening lines at minimum

evals.prompt: I sent 3 emails and have not heard back. Should I give up or keep following up?
evals.expected_output: Explain 3 emails is only Touch 3 of an 8-10 touch sequence, recommend switching channels, give specific next touch.
expectations: The response explains that 3 emails is only Touch 3 in an 8-10 touch sequence
The response recommends switching channels (LinkedIn or phone for the next touch)
The response provides the full multi-touch sequence architecture
The response specifies each new touch must add a different value angle
